project.name: ar-tata-surya
project.currentFocus: WebAR viewport fit, GLB scale normalization, and planet texture recovery
durableFacts: AR experience depends on A-Frame and AR.js webcam video layering and readiness checks.
GLB solar system and focus planet sizing is normalized with an A-Frame auto-model-scale component using THREE.Box3 target sizes.
Some planet GLBs use legacy material data, so focus mode includes runtime texture recovery from public/textures when GLB maps are missing.

lastAchievements: Added auto-model-scale to normalize GLB bounding boxes after model-loaded.
Added device target sizes for small-phone, phone, large-phone, tablet, and desktop.
Applied normalized sizing to solar_system.glb and focus planet GLBs with per-planet multipliers.
Compacted mobile focus overlays and preserved AR camera layering.
Added viewport-width fitting for AR camera/canvas surfaces to avoid right-side cropping on mobile Chrome.
Added material recovery for focus planet GLBs and rotated solar_system.glb toward a horizontal Sketchfab-like preview orientation.
Build passed with npm.cmd run build.
pendingIssues: Verify normalized GLB sizing on Vercel HTTPS with a physical Hiro marker.
Check Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, and solar_system orientation on Infinix Note 40 portrait.
nextBestActions: Test with ?debug=true to review auto-model-scale bounding box telemetry.
Tune DEVICE_TARGET_SIZE_MAP or per-planet focusTargetSizeMultiplier if a model still feels too large or too small.
Use ?debug=true to confirm viewport, bounding box, and recovered material logs on deployed HTTPS.
